era_context: Middle Bronze Age; Old Babylonian period in Mesopotamia (Samsu-iluna's reign); Hittite Old Kingdom; Indus Valley Civilization in terminal decline; Egypt in late Middle Kingdom or early Second Intermediate Period; Shang dynasty traditionally dated to begin c. 1600 BCE (unconfirmed).
disconfirming_evidence: No specific events are attested for this year in surviving sources.
historiographic_note: This year, like most years in the ancient world, leaves no documentary trace. The historical record for the mid-second millennium BCE is fragmentary and heavily dependent on chronological reconstruction from king lists, astronomical calculations, and radiocarbon dating. Absolute chronology remains contested across all regions.
